#pragma warning disable CS0436 // Use of local types when imported types by the same name exist.

namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator
{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit> Unit => __Unit ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Unit, __Create_Unit());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit>? __Unit;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit> __Create_Unit()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit>
            {
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_Unit,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IConstructorShape __CreateConstructor_Unit()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenConstructorShape<global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit, global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.EmptyArgumentState>
            {
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit>)Unit,
                DefaultConstructor = static () => new global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit(),
                MethodBaseFactory = static () => typeof(global::PolyType.Abstractions.Unit).GetConstructor(__BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsPublic = true,
            };
        }
    }
}
